EV-FCYRXROI.title: cctv_snapshot.png
EV-FCYRXROI.description: An outdoor street scene at night with a person running towards the camera. The street is lined with buildings and parked cars. There is a timestamp overlay in the image.

EV-HUP2BUTT.title: crime_scene_photo_1.png
EV-HUP2BUTT.description: The image shows a disordered bar interior with broken glass and overturned furniture on a wooden floor. There is a noticeable bloodstain on the floor, suggesting a violent event.

EV-FCTFTVSU.title: Screenshot 2026-03-27 at 9.41.04 PM.png
EV-FCTFTVSU.description: The scene depicts a dimly lit bar interior with overturned stools and a large blood stain on the wooden floor. Various shattered glass and bottles are scattered around the area. The bar counter runs along the left side, lined with numerous bottles and glasses. The atmosphere suggests recent chaos or violence.
